releaseNotes.zh-CN:
DataWhere 1.1.3

新功能
- PostgreSQL 工作台支持视图(VIEW)和物化视图(MATERIALIZED VIEW)的浏览、搜索和 DDL 查看
- 搜索结果类型标签国际化（中文环境显示「表」「视图」「物化视图」等）
- 搜索跳转工作台时自动展开对应分类目录

问题修复
- 修复 Redis 5.0.14.1 元数据同步 UTF-8 转换错误
- 修复重启应用后搜索无法找到数据的问题
- 修复物化视图字段列表为空的问题
- 修复 varchar 类型显示为「character varying」的问题
releaseNotes.en-US:
DataWhere 1.1.3

New Features
- PostgreSQL workspace now supports views and materialized views browsing, search, and DDL viewing
- Search result type labels are now localized (e.g., Table, View, Materialized View)
- Clicking a search result auto-expands the correct category in the workspace sidebar

Bug Fixes
- Fixed Redis 5.0.14.1 metadata sync UTF-8 conversion error
- Fixed search returning empty results after app restart
- Fixed materialized view field list showing empty
- Fixed varchar type displayed as "character varying"
